blockingIssues.description: BackfillSchedulerTests runtime guard tests still validate direct BackfillCursorStore.advanceCursor behavior and do not execute UsageAggregator.refreshAll/runScheduledBackfillIfNeeded failure/success runtime paths required by the prior failed review.

Fix is orthogonal to the prior backfill blockers: commit adds switcher cross-flow tests and project wiring, but does not modify backfill runtime guard logic or runtime-coverage tests tied to the original failure.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce required startup-read evidence for mission + AGENTS + .factory/library files in verification.commandsRun before allowing followedProcedure=true.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of m4-fix-backfill-storage-precision-monotonic-compare reported missing .factory/library/architecture.md and .factory/library/user-testing.md read evidence while followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require full 40-character commit SHA and required context-read evidence whenever followedProcedure=true in handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of m4-unblock-scrutiny-switchercrossflow-failures found abbreviated commitId and missing context-read evidence despite followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refresh .factory/library/architecture.md and .factory/library/user-testing.md so token-accounting/backfill workers are not guided by switcher-centric content.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review flagged both shared library files as switcher-focused and misaligned with m4 reconciliation/backfill mission context.
